configurePresets.name: vs2022-x64
configurePresets.description: Generates a .sln/.vcxproj tree under build/ using the VS 2022 generator.

configurePresets.name: vs2022-x64-sdk-override
configurePresets.description: Same as vs2022-x64 but forces the ATS-SDK location. Edit ATS_SDK_ROOT below if your SDK version differs.

configurePresets.name: ninja-x64-release
configurePresets.description: Fast command-line build. Requires running from a 'Developer Command Prompt for VS 2022' so cl.exe is on PATH.
